faqs.question: Is the college AICTE approved?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sunrise Institute of Technology is approved by AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education) and has received NAAC A+ accreditation.

faqs.question: What is the placement record?
faqs.answer: Our placement rate is 94% with an average package of ₹6.8 LPA and highest package of ₹24 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Amazon, Microsoft and more.

faqs.question: Is there a transport facility?
faqs.answer: Yes, the college provides bus service covering major areas of Bhopal. Monthly bus pass is available at ₹1,200/month.

faqs.question: Can I change my course after admission?
faqs.answer: Course change requests are entertained within the first 30 days of admission, subject to seat availability and eligibility criteria.

faqs.question: What is the medium of instruction?
faqs.answer: The medium of instruction is English for all technical programs. Hindi is used as a supplementary language for better understanding.

faqs.question: Are there any lateral entry admissions?
faqs.answer: Yes, lateral entry is available for B.Tech (2nd year) for diploma holders with 60% marks. Direct 2nd year admission based on merit.

faqs.question: What is the library timing?
faqs.answer: The central library is open Monday to Saturday from 8 AM to 8 PM. Digital library resources are available 24/7 online.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for BBA and BCA?
faqs.answer: BBA and BCA admissions are direct (merit-based on 12th marks). No separate entrance exam is required.
